title: PeteMart Skills Manifest — Open-Source Assets Pulled by Infra-DevOps Agent
description: Registry of open-source tools, frameworks, and skill assets programmatically pulled and stored into .antigravity/skills/

skills.name: PR Agent
skills.description: Automated PR review and code analysis tool (free tier)

skills.name: Jira CLI Connector
skills.description: Command-line Jira integration for automated ticket management

skills.name: TruffleHog
skills.description: Secrets scanning tool for credential detection

skills.name: Gitleaks
skills.description: Static analysis for secrets in git repos

skills.name: Playwright
skills.description: End-to-end testing and visual regression framework

skills.name: BackstopJS
skills.description: Visual regression testing tool for UI comparison

skills.name: Checkov
skills.description: Infrastructure as Code security scanner (Docker, K8s, Terraform)

skills.name: CodeQL
skills.description: GitHub's semantic code analysis engine for vulnerability detection

skills.name: Supabase CLI
skills.description: Local Supabase development, migration, and deployment CLI

skills.name: Vercel CLI
skills.description: Vercel deployment and preview management CLI

skills.name: Open-Source PRD Template
skills.description: Standard Agile PRD formatting template for Agent 02

skills.name: Mermaid CLI
skills.description: Generate architecture diagrams from Mermaid.js for Agent 03

skills.name: PlantUML
skills.description: Sequence and deployment diagram generation for Agent 03

skills.name: Retail Seed Datasets
skills.description: Sample retail/e-commerce datasets for merchant mock matrices (Agent 04)

skills.name: Socket.dev GitHub Action
skills.description: Supply chain security for npm/pnpm dependencies

skills.name: OpenClaw Diagnostics
skills.description: Autonomous diagnostics framework for Agent 13 (Maintenance Agent)
